title: gomphocarpus tomentosus subsp. tomentosus
intro: Gomphocarpus tomentosus subsp. tomentosus, also known as the Woolly Balloonplant, is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in African medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Gomphocarpus tomentosus subsp. tomentosus include the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and wounds, as well as being used as a purgative. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
